case_title: BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE WELFARE FUND VS ABC PARKING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $196.85 FILED BY BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE WELFARE FUND AS TO DEFENDANT ABC PARKING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
